{{Quote|Dirty Corellian cop on the take, took too much. Fry him.|The bounty posting on Mill Timmer|<ref name="SWBH" />}}
'''Mill Timmer''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] who served as an [[Police officer/Legends|officer]] with the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Police Force]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Mill Timmer was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who originated from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. He became a [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] with the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Police Force]] on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Timmer, however, became a dirty cop and was one the take. At one point he took more than he was supposed to causing the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Sebolto]] to put a 2,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] out for Timmer's [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="BHPOSG" />
{{Gamemechanics}}
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] found Timmer in Coruscant's [[Financial District (Coruscant)/Legends|Financial District]]. Fett managed to shoot and kill Timmer and collected on the bounty.<ref name="SWBH" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
Timmer was a Human male with dark [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and light skin.<ref name="BHPOSG" /> When on duty, he wore his [[Coruscant Security Force uniform|CSF uniform]] and carried a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].<ref name="SWBH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mill Timmer first appeared in ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' a single player game released on [[December 5]], [[2002]]. The player can choose to pursue Mill Timmer's bounty though it is not required to move to the next level. He also had an entry in ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' which was published on [[November 26]], [[2002]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
